description: Configure the presentation and completion settings for the 'TechSummit 2024 Attendee Feedback' survey in LimeSurvey (admin/Admin123!). Set the Welcome message to 'Welcome to the TechSummit 2024 Attendee Feedback Survey. Your responses will help us improve future events. This survey takes approximately 5 minutes to complete.' and the End message to 'Thank you for sharing your valuable feedback about TechSummit 2024. Your input directly shapes our future events.' Set the End URL to 'https://techsummit2024.example.com/thank-you' and enable automatic URL loading. Additionally, set the survey format to 'Group by group' and enable the progress bar, answer printing, and backward navigation.
